# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use GuzzleHttp\Client;

class PreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function getPreview(Request $request)
    {
        $url = $request->input('url');

        if (filter_var($url, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL) === false) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Invalid URL'], 400);
        }

        try {
            $client = new Client();
            $response = $client->get($url);
            $html = $response->getBody();

            // Use DOMDocument to parse HTML and extract title, description, and image
            $dom = new \DOMDocument;
            @$dom->loadHTML($html);

            $title = '';
            $description = '';
            $image = '';

            if ($metaTitle = $dom->getElementsByTagName('title')->item(0)) {
                $title = $metaTitle->nodeValue;
            }

            foreach ($dom->getElementsByTagName('meta') as $meta) {
                if ($meta->getAttribute('name') == 'description' || $meta->getAttribute('property') == 'og:description') {
                    $description = $meta->getAttribute('content');
                    break;
                }
            }

            foreach ($dom->getElementsByTagName('img') as $img) {
                if ($src = $img->getAttribute('src')) {
                    $image = filter_var($src, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL) ? $src : urljoin($url, $src);
                    break;
                }
            }

            return response()->json([
                'title' => $title,
                'description' => $description,
                'image' => $image
            ]);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Failed to fetch URL content'], 500);
        }
    }

    private function urljoin($base, $rel)
    {
        if (parse_url($rel, PHP_URL_SCHEME)) {
            return $rel;
        }

        return rtrim($base, '/') . '/' . ltrim($rel, '/');
    }
}
